response.overview: A woman races through the night. Her nerves frayed by the pain of a breakup and excessive drinking, she can barely make out what’s happening behind the rain-streaked windshield. Bang! What was that? Was there a child? Bewildered and assuming she has injured someone, the confused woman gets out of the car, only to find herself in a world of horror. Mirages and apparitions of female ghosts cloud her vision. Her search for a mechanic ends in sheer horror.
response.tagline: Her search for a mechanic ends in sheer horror.
response.title: The Stolen Future
